summary: Clear audience recording of the tour‑opener, hailed as a top source for this show despite no detailed musical notes.
review: Both reviewers compliment the tape’s sound quality, calling it a nice‑sounding audience recording and the best available source for the tour opener. No specific musical moments or song performances are mentioned, so the analysis focuses on the recording’s clarity rather than the show itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief, positive comments are available; they praise the audience recording but give no insight into performance quality, leading to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as ‘nice sounding’ and the best available source for this tour opener; clear enough for listeners despite being an audience tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or song performance were provided.
